requiredSecrets.name: TWITTER_CLIENT_ID
requiredSecrets.label: X / Twitter Client ID
requiredSecrets.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID from your X developer app (confidential client).

requiredSecrets.name: TWITTER_CLIENT_SECRET
requiredSecrets.label: X / Twitter Client Secret
requiredSecrets.description: OAuth 2.0 client secret from your X developer app.

requiredSecrets.name: TWITTER_REFRESH_TOKEN
requiredSecrets.label: Connect your X account
requiredSecrets.description: Authorize the app once; the refresh token is minted into the habitat — you never paste it.

requiredSecrets.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
requiredSecrets.label: OpenRouter API key
requiredSecrets.description: LLM provider key for this habitat.
